operating_ranges.evidence: Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min with oscillation speed of 0.0 mm/min

fault_conditions.name: door_not_closed
fault_conditions.description: Door closure status monitoring for safe operation
fault_conditions.evidence: Alarm on digital in doorclsd[3] = OFF

fault_conditions.name: boat_position_timeout
fault_conditions.description: Boat fails to reach setpoint position within expected time
fault_conditions.symptoms: Wait for boat to reach setpoint fails
fault_conditions.evidence: Wait for boat to reach setpoint

assumptions.statement: The boat loader operates in a cleanroom environment with laminar flow
assumptions.reason: Manual mentions cleanroom placement and horizontal laminar flow for particle prevention

assumptions.statement: Boat loader has safety interlocks with door position
assumptions.reason: Recipe shows door closure monitoring and alarm conditions tied to boat operations

assumptions.statement: Boat loader supports wafer boat oscillation capability
assumptions.reason: Recipe parameters include oscillation speed settings, though typically set to 0.0 mm/min
